info.title: dotnet-vstemplate
info.description: Pack dotnet templating templates into a VSIX to install the templates in Visual Studio.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: Source
options.description: NuGet package to generate a vsix file for.

options.name: force
options.description: Set to overwrite vsix at output path if it exists.

options.name: vsix-version
options.description: Override the version of the vsix package. Defaults to the version of the source nupkg (strips pre-release version; anything after a '-').

options.name: release-notes
options.description: Path to file or URL to site of release notes.

options.name: package-icon
options.description: Path to image to use for VSIX icon. (32x32)

options.name: preview-img
options.description: Path to image to use for VSIX preview image. (200x200)

options.name: package-tags
options.description: List of tags for the VSIX Tags property.

options.name: template-icon
options.description: Mapping for icons for the individual templates.

options.name: language-tag
options.description: Mapping for language tags for the individual templates. This value can be extracted from the manifest.json file, see the docs.

options.name: platform-tags
options.description: Mapping for platform tags for the individual templates.

options.name: type-tags
options.description: Project type tags to add to the vstemplate.

options.name: default-name
options.description: Mapping for the default project name for the individual templates. This value can be extracted from the manifest.json file, see the docs.
